title: La favorita
writer: Cesare Barlacchi, Alphonse Royer, Gustave Vaëz
actors: Sophia Loren, Franca Tamantini, Paolo Silveri
plot: While not completly stage-bound, this film of Donizetti's opera doesn't stray far from such an impression. The story of a tragic love affair involving commoners and royality in 1340 Spain finds Ferdinand (Gino Sininberghi) falling...
